Vendored published gadget assets used by `rev_gol_proof`.

Source:
- upstream published gadget repository accompanying the Rev-GOL NP-completeness construction

Purpose:
- runtime loading of the published part-1 gadget, connector, and tile `.cvs` patterns
- proof-side verification and board emission in `crates/rev_gol_proof`

Included here so `rev_gol_proof` remains self-contained and does not depend on any external
reference-tree checkout at runtime.

Original upstream license and README are preserved alongside these files.
